info.title: POWER Daily API
info.description: The API allows daily data requests of POWER Analysis Ready Data (ARD).

get.description: Retrieve daily time series data for a specific geographic location from NASA POWER datasets

parameters.name: start

schema.title: Start Time
schema.description: Start date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20200101 for January 1, 2020). Must be >= 19810101.

parameters.description: Start date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20200101 for January 1, 2020). Must be >= 19810101.

parameters.name: end

schema.title: End Time
schema.description: End date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20201231 for December 31, 2020). Must be >= start date.

parameters.description: End date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20201231 for December 31, 2020). Must be >= start date.

parameters.name: latitude

schema.title: Latitude Value
schema.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. Valid range: -90.0 to 90.0. North is positive, South is negative.

parameters.description: Latitude in decimal degrees. Valid range: -90.0 to 90.0. North is positive, South is negative.

parameters.name: longitude

schema.title: Longitude Value
schema.description: Longitude in decimal degrees. Valid range: -180.0 to 180.0. East is positive, West is negative.

parameters.description: Longitude in decimal degrees. Valid range: -180.0 to 180.0. East is positive, West is negative.

parameters.name: community

schema.title: User Community
schema.description: User community determining output units and parameters. Options: RE (Renewable Energy), AG (Agroclimatology), SB (Sustainable Buildings).

parameters.description: User community determining output units and parameters. Options: RE (Renewable Energy), AG (Agroclimatology), SB (Sustainable Buildings).

parameters.name: parameters

schema.title: Parameter Abbreviations
schema.description: Comma-separated list of parameter codes (e.g., 'T2M,ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN,RH2M'). Use /configuration endpoint to see available parameters.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of parameter codes (e.g., 'T2M,ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN,RH2M'). Use /configuration endpoint to see available parameters.

parameters.name: format

schema.title: Format Abbreviation
schema.description: Output format: JSON (default), CSV, ASCII, or NETCDF. JSON recommended for API clients.

parameters.description: Output format: JSON (default), CSV, ASCII, or NETCDF. JSON recommended for API clients.

parameters.name: units

schema.title: Units Type
schema.description: Unit system: 'metric' (default) or 'imperial'. Applies to temperature, speed, and other measurements.

parameters.description: Unit system: 'metric' (default) or 'imperial'. Applies to temperature, speed, and other measurements.

parameters.name: user

schema.title: User Name
schema.description: Optional username or identifier for request tracking and analytics. Not required.

parameters.description: Optional username or identifier for request tracking and analytics. Not required.

parameters.name: header

schema.title: File Header
schema.description: Include header metadata in CSV/ASCII output. Set to false for headerless data files.

parameters.description: Include header metadata in CSV/ASCII output. Set to false for headerless data files.

parameters.name: time-standard

schema.title: Time Standard
schema.description: Time standard for timestamps: 'LST' (Local Solar Time, default) or 'UTC' (Coordinated Universal Time).

parameters.description: Time standard for timestamps: 'LST' (Local Solar Time, default) or 'UTC' (Coordinated Universal Time).

parameters.name: site-elevation

schema.title: Site Elevation
schema.description: Custom site elevation in meters for atmospheric pressure correction. If omitted, MERRA-2 elevation is used.

parameters.description: Custom site elevation in meters for atmospheric pressure correction. If omitted, MERRA-2 elevation is used.

parameters.name: wind-elevation

schema.title: Wind Elevation
schema.description: Custom height in meters above ground for wind speed adjustment. If omitted, standard 2m or 10m height is used.

parameters.description: Custom height in meters above ground for wind speed adjustment. If omitted, standard 2m or 10m height is used.

parameters.name: wind-surface

schema.title: Wind Surface Type
schema.description: Surface roughness type for wind speed adjustment (e.g., 'airportice', 'grass'). See documentation for valid values.

parameters.description: Surface roughness type for wind speed adjustment (e.g., 'airportice', 'grass'). See documentation for valid values.

header.title: NASA/POWER Source Native Resolution Daily Data

text/ascii.example:
-BEGIN HEADER- 
 NASA/POWER Source Native Resolution Daily Data 
 Dates (month/day/year): MM/DD/YYYY through MM/DD/YYYY 
 Location: Latitude  <value>   Longitude  <value>  
 Elevation from MERRA-2: Average for 0.5 x 0.625 degree lat/lon region = <value> meters 
 The value for missing source data that cannot be computed or is outside of the sources availability range: -999  
 Parameter(s):  
 NAME     SOURCE Short Description Text (Unit)  
 YEAR  MO  DY  NAME 
 -END HEADER- 
 YYYY  MM  DY  <value>

text/csv.example:
-BEGIN HEADER- 
 NASA/POWER Source Native Resolution Daily Data 
 Dates (month/day/year): MM/DD/YYYY through MM/DD/YYYY 
 Location: Latitude  <value>   Longitude  <value> 
 Elevation from MERRA-2: Average for 0.5 x 0.625 degree lat/lon region = <value> meters 
 The value for missing source data that cannot be computed or is outside of the sources availability range: -999 
 Parameter(s): 
 NAME     SOURCE Short Description Text (Unit) 
 YEAR,MO,DY,NAME 
 -END HEADER- 
 YYYY,MM,DY,<value>

example.header: The POWER Daily API failed to complete your request; please review the errors below and the POWER Docs (https://power.larc.nasa.gov/docs/).
example.messages: A list of messages of corrections needed for the API request to be valid.

example.header: The POWER Daily API failed to complete your request due to the submission of too many requests.
example.message: The POWER Daily API is unreachable due too many requests are being submitted. Please try again later. If the rate limiting persists, please email larc-power-project@mail.nasa.gov with the request URL and any other relevant information to determine an appropriate solution to obtain uninterrupted access.

example.header: The POWER Daily API failed to complete your request. A an unknown error has occurred please try again later. If the issue persists please email larc-power-project@mail.nasa.gov with the request URL and any other relevant information.
example.message: The POWER Daily API is unreachable due to an unknown error (Server Side Error).

example.header: The POWER Daily API failed to complete your request. A required backend service is unavailable at the current time please try again later. If the issue persists please email larc-power-project@mail.nasa.gov with the request URL and any other relevant information.
example.message: The name of the backend service that is unavailable.

get.description: Retrieve daily gridded time series data for a bounding box region from NASA POWER datasets

parameters.name: start

schema.title: Start Time
schema.description: Start date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20200101). Must be >= 19810101.

parameters.description: Start date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20200101). Must be >= 19810101.

parameters.name: end

schema.title: End Time
schema.description: End date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20201231). Must be >= start date.

parameters.description: End date in YYYYMMDD format (e.g., 20201231). Must be >= start date.

parameters.name: latitude-min

schema.title: Minimum Latitude Value
schema.description: Minimum latitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -90.0 to 90.0. Must be < latitude-max.

parameters.description: Minimum latitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -90.0 to 90.0. Must be < latitude-max.

parameters.name: latitude-max

schema.title: Maximum Latitude Value
schema.description: Maximum latitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -90.0 to 90.0. Must be > latitude-min.

parameters.description: Maximum latitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -90.0 to 90.0. Must be > latitude-min.

parameters.name: longitude-min

schema.title: Minimum Longitude Value
schema.description: Minimum longitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -180.0 to 180.0. Must be < longitude-max.

parameters.description: Minimum longitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -180.0 to 180.0. Must be < longitude-max.

parameters.name: longitude-max

schema.title: Maximum Longitude Value
schema.description: Maximum longitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -180.0 to 180.0. Must be > longitude-min.

parameters.description: Maximum longitude of bounding box in decimal degrees. Valid range: -180.0 to 180.0. Must be > longitude-min.

parameters.name: community

schema.title: User Community
schema.description: User community determining output units and parameters. Options: RE (Renewable Energy), AG (Agroclimatology), SB (Sustainable Buildings).

parameters.description: User community determining output units and parameters. Options: RE (Renewable Energy), AG (Agroclimatology), SB (Sustainable Buildings).

parameters.name: parameters

schema.title: Parameter Abbreviations
schema.description: Comma-separated list of parameter codes (e.g., 'T2M,ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN,RH2M'). Use /configuration endpoint to see available parameters.

parameters.description: Comma-separated list of parameter codes (e.g., 'T2M,ALLSKY_SFC_SW_DWN,RH2M'). Use /configuration endpoint to see available parameters.

parameters.name: format

schema.title: Format Abbreviation
schema.description: Output format: JSON (default), CSV, ASCII, NETCDF, or XARRAY. NETCDF recommended for large regions.

parameters.description: Output format: JSON (default), CSV, ASCII, NETCDF, or XARRAY. NETCDF recommended for large regions.

parameters.name: units

schema.title: Units Type
schema.description: Unit system: 'metric' (default) or 'imperial'. Applies to temperature, speed, and other measurements.

parameters.description: Unit system: 'metric' (default) or 'imperial'. Applies to temperature, speed, and other measurements.

parameters.name: user

schema.title: User Name
schema.description: Optional username or identifier for request tracking. Not required.

parameters.description: Optional username or identifier for request tracking. Not required.

parameters.name: header

schema.title: File Header
schema.description: Include header metadata in CSV/ASCII output. Set to false for headerless data files.

parameters.description: Include header metadata in CSV/ASCII output. Set to false for headerless data files.

parameters.name: time-standard

schema.title: Time Standard
schema.description: Time standard for timestamps: 'LST' (Local Solar Time, default) or 'UTC'.

parameters.description: Time standard for timestamps: 'LST' (Local Solar Time, default) or 'UTC'.

get.description: Get available parameters, formats, date ranges, and API capabilities

documentation.title: POWER Daily API
documentation.description: The API allows daily data requests of POWER Analysis Ready Data (ARD).

description.title: Description
description.description: A short description of the purpose of the API.

start.title: Start
start.description: The first date of data available.

end.title: End
end.description: The last date of data available.
